longBusinessSummary: Bendigo and Adelaide Bank Limited engages in the provision of banking and other financial services to retail customers and small to medium sized businesses in Australia. It operates through Consumer, Business and Agribusiness, and Corporate segments. The company offers transaction and savings account; term deposit; managed funds; share trading; margin lending; and private banking services. It also provides home and personal loans, as well as business loans, equipment finance, and foreign exchange; credit and debit cards; personal insurance; travel and holiday products; and financial advice services. In addition, the company offers EFTPOS and payment services, agribusiness solutions, and private banking; residential, business, rural and commercial lending; payments services, wealth management, margin lending, treasury, and foreign exchange services. It operates under the Bendigo Bank, Up, Leveraged, and Community Enterprise Foundation brands. The company was founded in 1858 and is headquartered in Bendigo, Australia.
